{"acceptance_criteria":["Adjacent date ranges do not overlap when one range ends exactly when another begins.","Nested date ranges overlap.","Identical date ranges overlap.","Invalid ranges are rejected before overlap evaluation.","`npm test` passes."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: Date Range Overlap Logic

## Goal
Fix date range overlap behavior so valid ranges are evaluated correctly and invalid ranges are rejected.

## Requirements
- Treat adjacent ranges as non-overlapping.
- Treat nested ranges as overlapping.
- Treat identical ranges as overlapping.
- Reject invalid ranges, including ranges whose start is after their end.
- Preserve existing public API shape unless tests show the current contract requires adjustment.

## Validation
Run `npm test` and confirm all date range tests pass.","risks":["Existing callers may rely on permissive handling of invalid ranges.","Date boundary inclusivity may be implicit in current tests and should be made explicit in the bugfix tests."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["Add or update tests covering adjacent, nested, identical, and invalid ranges.","Update overlap logic so adjacency is not treated as overlap.","Ensure invalid ranges are rejected consistently.","Run `npm test` successfully."],"description":"Fix date range validation and overlap detection in `src/date-range.js`, with focused coverage in `test/date-range.test.js` for adjacency, nesting, identical ranges, and invalid inputs.","id":"T1","likely_files":["src/date-range.js","test/date-range.test.js"],"title":"Fix date range overlap semantics","validation_commands":["npm test"]}]}
